name: Jalapeno Puffs
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup reduced-fat sharp cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Heat 24 mini-muffin cups until hot.
3. Blend all ingredients in a blender at medium speed for about 30-45 seconds.
4. Spray the hot muffin cups and fill each about 2/3 full.
5. Bake for about 10 minutes, or until puffed and lightly browned.
6. Makes 8 servings of 3 puffs each.
7. Per serving: 67 Kcal, 2.5g fat (1.1g sat fat), 33% CFF, 127mg Na, 0.1g fiber (5.7g PRO/ 2.5g FAT/ 5.6g CHO).
8. Each puff: 22 Kcal, 0.8g fat (0.4g sat fat), 33% CFF, 42mg Na, 0g fiber (1.9g PRO/ 0.8g FAT/ 1.9g CHO).
